title: BeeLlama.cpp: advanced DFlash & TurboQuant with support of reasoning and vision. Qwen 3.6 27B Q5 with 200k context on 3090, 2-3x faster than baseline (peak 135 tps!)
summary: BeeLlama.cpp: advanced DFlash & TurboQuant with support of reasoning and vision. Qwen 3.6 27B Q5 with 200k context on 3090, 2-3x faster than baseline (peak 135 tps!)
whyItMatters: A community signal rather than a settled claim. Useful for spotting what builders are trying, what problems are recurring, and which projects may deserve a closer look.
